Software Builder
Background

My Journey

The path that shaped my engineering mindset and passion for builder-level execution.

01 / The Spark of Curiosity

My path began with a deep fascination for how complex software works behind simple interfaces. I didn't want to just use technology; I wanted to control it, starting with writing automation scripts and learning the inner workings of computers.

02 / Mastering the Stack

I dedicated thousands of hours to coding, learning JavaScript, Python, and modern framework ecosystems. Building full-stack systems taught me how to tie databases, servers, and visual clients together into high-performance experiences.

03 / The AI Pivot

As the AI revolution unfolded, I recognized that code is no longer just instructions—it is agency. I pivoted to integrating LLMs, configuring automation pipelines (via Make, n8n), and crafting custom agents that perform manual business tasks automatically.

04 / High-Value Problem Solving

Today, I operate with a founder's perspective. I don't build software just to check boxes; I build to drive efficiency, eliminate overhead, and bring digital products to market. Every line of code I write is designed to solve a tangible problem.

Case Studies

Engineered Solutions

A deep dive into systems designed for performance, impact, and user satisfaction.

TypeLabs

High-Fidelity Typing Engine & Performance Diagnostics

Challenge

Online typing tests are often generic, slow, and lack actionable, millisecond-accurate latency details on individual keystrokes to help users address bottlenecks.

Approach

Engineered a custom React application with strict state isolation and hardware-accelerated micro-interactions via GSAP. Programmed precise keypress event telemetry to measure inter-character delay instantly.

Outcome

Delivered an ultra-responsive interface with sub-10ms response times. Features include a dynamic character-level heat map and interactive typing metrics that increased user retention.

React GSAP Node.js Vercel Telemetry API
Live Product View Source

GitCommitter

Automated Workspace Hook & Commit Quality CLI

Challenge

Developers face speed overhead and format inconsistencies when writing commit logs. This degrades commit history readability and halts automation in continuous pipelines.

Approach

Designed a lightweight Node.js terminal app interacting with the system's local Git config. Built an interactive CLI wizard that auto-validates code diffs, prompts for details, and formats standard Conventional Commits.

Outcome

Eliminated manual commit formatting errors. Sped up repository commit loops by roughly 40% and improved searchability inside collaborative project histories.

Node.js Git API CLI Frameworks Shell Scripting
Live Demo View Source

Interests

What I'm Exploring

Keeping a pulse on emerging tech, frameworks, and patterns that will define the future of business.

AI Agents & RAG

Constructing multi-agent nodes that collaborate using custom databases to autonomously solve support, research, and analysis workflows.

Scalable SaaS

Studying multi-tenant database designs, dynamic billing architectures, and high-conversion landing page heuristics for digital products.

No-Code & Custom API Loops

Synthesizing webhooks, triggers, and automated logic bridges to bypass manual back-office tasks and save human hours.

Premium Dark UI

Investigating spatial UI layout, dynamic lighting styles, variable letter-spacing, and micro-physics animations that drive high retention.

Tech to Revenue Systems

Mapping software code directly to operational leverage. Designing architectures that reduce server costs while facilitating scalability.

Velocity Over Perfection

Optimizing developer tools, scaffolding setups, and modern frameworks to ship robust MVPs in days rather than months.
